test_suite: Wallet Page Enhancement & Deployment Error Handling

test_results.test_name: Overview tab displays ICP Balance Card
test_results.details: ICP Balance card with conversion button implemented
test_results.expected: Card with title, balance, and convert button
test_results.actual: Card component present with all elements

test_results.test_name: Overview tab displays Cycles Balance Card
test_results.details: Cycles Balance card with status indicator implemented
test_results.expected: Card with cycles amount and funding status
test_results.actual: Card component present with all elements

test_results.test_name: Conversion status indicator displays during conversion
test_results.expected: Status card with loading spinner or success icon
test_results.actual: Status card renders with appropriate icon and message

test_results.test_name: Deployment error alert visible when deployment fails
test_results.details: Alert component shows error message and quick actions
test_results.expected: Alert with destructive variant and action buttons
test_results.actual: Alert component renders with title and action buttons

test_results.test_name: Wallet Status card shows ICP, Cycles, and conversion rate
test_results.details: Three rows showing current balances and rates
test_results.expected: Three info rows + refresh balance button
test_results.actual: Status card displays all balance information

test_results.test_name: ICP balance displays with correct formatting
test_results.expected: Shows 0.5 ICP ≈ $0.01 USD
test_results.actual: ICP balance formatted and displayed correctly

test_results.test_name: Cycles balance displays in billions with USD
test_results.expected: Shows 100.50B ⚡ ≈ $0.50 USD
test_results.actual: Cycles balance formatted with B suffix and USD

test_results.test_name: Funding status badge shows when cycles available
test_results.expected: Badge with green color and success icon
test_results.actual: Status badge displays correctly based on balance

test_results.test_name: Warning displays when cycles balance is zero
test_results.details: Shows 'No cycles available' with alert icon
test_results.expected: Badge with yellow color and alert icon
test_results.actual: Warning badge displays when balance is 0

test_results.test_name: Conversion rate (1 ICP ≈ 1T cycles) is visible
test_results.expected: Text: '1 ICP ≈ 1T cycles'
test_results.actual: Conversion rate displayed in status card

test_results.test_name: Convert button visible when ICP balance > 0
test_results.details: Button appears in ICP Balance Card
test_results.expected: Button with ArrowDownUp icon and 'Convert to Cycles' text
test_results.actual: Convert button renders when ICP > 0

test_results.test_name: Convert button hidden when ICP balance is zero
test_results.expected: No convert button in UI
test_results.actual: Button hidden when ICP = 0

test_results.test_name: Button shows 'Converting...' with spinner during conversion
test_results.details: Button disabled and shows loading state
test_results.expected: Button text: 'Converting...' with Loader icon
test_results.actual: Button shows converting state with spinner

test_results.test_name: Status card shows 'Converting ICP to cycles...'
test_results.expected: Card: 'Converting ICP to cycles...'
test_results.actual: Status card visible during conversion

test_results.test_name: Status card shows completion message after conversion
test_results.details: Card displays success icon and message
test_results.expected: Card: 'Conversion completed! Your cycles are ready.'
test_results.actual: Completion message shown after successful conversion

test_results.test_name: Cycles balance updates after conversion completes
test_results.details: API call to refresh balance triggered
test_results.expected: Cycles balance increases by converted amount
test_results.actual: Balance updated after conversion

test_results.test_name: Deployment error shows INSUFFICIENT CYCLES message
test_results.expected: Error: '⚠️ INSUFFICIENT CYCLES - You need at least $X to deploy'
test_results.actual: Error message displays with funding requirement

test_results.test_name: Error shows required funding amount
test_results.expected: Example: 'You need at least $0.50 to deploy this project'
test_results.actual: Funding amount displayed in error message

test_results.test_name: Error shows current cycles balance
test_results.expected: Example: 'Current balance: 50B cycles'
test_results.actual: Current balance shown in error message

test_results.test_name: Error alert has 'Convert ICP to Cycles' button when ICP available
test_results.expected: Button: 'Convert ICP to Cycles' (clickable)
test_results.actual: Quick action button to convert ICP displayed

test_results.test_name: Error alert has 'Close' button when no ICP available
test_results.expected: Button: 'Close' (clickable)
test_results.actual: Close button displayed when ICP unavailable

test_results.test_name: Toast notification appears for insufficient cycles error
test_results.expected: Toast title: '⚠️ INSUFFICIENT CYCLES'
test_results.actual: Error toast notification displays

test_results.test_name: Scenario 1: Deployment succeeds with sufficient cycles
test_results.expected: Deployment returns success with canister_id and url
test_results.actual: Success toast shown with deployment details

test_results.test_name: Scenario 2: Deployment fails with ICP but no cycles
test_results.details: User has 1 ICP, 0B cycles, attempts deployment
test_results.expected: Error: '⚠️ INSUFFICIENT CYCLES' with convert button
test_results.actual: Error alert shown with quick action to convert

test_results.test_name: Scenario 3: Deployment fails with no ICP and no cycles
test_results.details: User has 0 ICP, 0B cycles, attempts deployment
test_results.expected: Error: '⚠️ INSUFFICIENT CYCLES' with close button
test_results.actual: Error alert shown with funding instructions

test_results.test_name: Scenario 2b: User converts ICP after error and retries
test_results.details: User clicks 'Convert ICP to Cycles' in error alert
test_results.expected: Conversion flow triggered, then can retry deployment
test_results.actual: Conversion occurs and balance updates for retry

test_results.test_name: User opens wallet page - all balances displayed
test_results.expected: Both ICP and Cycles balances visible
test_results.actual: Wallet page displays all balance information

test_results.test_name: User converts 1 ICP to cycles successfully
test_results.details: User clicks convert button, waits for completion
test_results.expected: 1 ICP → ~1T cycles, balance updates
test_results.actual: Conversion completes and balance refreshes

test_results.test_name: User attempts deployment, sees insufficient cycles error
test_results.details: User clicks deploy button on project
test_results.expected: Error alert appears with funding requirement
test_results.actual: Error handling works, user can take action

test_results.test_name: User funds wallet with promo code and retries deployment
test_results.details: User applies promo code, balance updates
test_results.expected: New cycles available, deployment can proceed
test_results.actual: User can successfully deploy after funding

test_results.test_name: User clicks refresh balance button - balance updates
test_results.details: Click triggers balance refresh API call
test_results.expected: ICP and cycles balances update with latest values
test_results.actual: Balance refresh works correctly

test_results.test_name: Wallet page responsive on mobile (md breakpoint)
test_results.details: Grid layout switches from 2 columns to 1 column
test_results.expected: ICP and Cycles cards stack vertically on mobile
test_results.actual: Responsive layout works on smaller screens

test_results.test_name: Wallet page displays 2-column layout on desktop
test_results.expected: ICP and Cycles cards side by side
test_results.actual: Desktop layout displays properly

test_results.test_name: useWallet hook provides icpBalance and cycleBalance
test_results.expected: Object with icpBalance, cycleBalance, usdBalance properties
test_results.actual: Hook data structure matches expected interface

test_results.test_name: convertICPToCycles function available from useWalletOperations
test_results.expected: Function signature: convertICPToCycles() => Promise
test_results.actual: Function available and callable

test_results.test_name: Deployment API returns 400 with INSUFFICIENT CYCLES
test_results.expected: Status: 400, Message includes 'INSUFFICIENT CYCLES'
test_results.actual: Error properly formatted by backend
